author: Jochen D.
pros: Stable and fast WebDriver tests on multiple OSes.
cons: Slow connection when doing manual testing.

author: M Stefan W.
pros: Exactly what I needed. It was great to test on different devices and make our app work more consistently across environments.
cons: Some of the devices were a little bit slow, but honestly that may have just been a natural limitation of the older devices. Since I needed to test on a range of devices, I didn't mind this at all.

author: Ujjal R.
pros: No devices worked for me. Kept saying something went wrong. I had paid but could not use.
cons: Nothing and very bad. I want my refund please . too bad with a minus rating.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Szymon C.
pros: I just needed to test and debug styling of one single website so definitely was not interested in an annual purchase. You offer a monthly purchase and a free trial which was just right. And the website inspector was working and very useful!
cons: There could be an option to pay per hours of testing because $30 USD for 2 hours of testing I needed is still quiet a lot.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Roderick N.
pros: it gave me access to environments that I don't physically have access to.
cons: the cost, I only have need for a few hours over a few days. but having to sign up for a monthly subscription that would only need once every couple months.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Doesn't works for me, under GNU/Linux and Mozilla Firefox
description: Not good. May be add detection of interaction of the user on the device screen to count it as working process, for now I can't say anything else that « it's not works », and can't retry on iOS because now it's only on Android device (and I don't need it)
author: Guillaume L.
pros: No able to test it because it's not works
cons: I've tried to make it works on iOS, this seems to have done something because I can now access to the video, but I got a black screen few seconds after the progress bar on the iPhone image, with no choice to retry (only Android phones now... )
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Using it as a cloud computer service.
author: Sam A.
pros: It was very easy to use and it is inexpensive
cons: There wasn't anything that I had found wrong with it so I give it 5 stars and 2 thumbs up.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Simply amazing! I am now sure my site looks reasonable on a variety of platforms: MacOS/Safari, Windows Chrome/Edge/Firefox.
author: Russ F.
pros: Very easy to use - allows a choice of browser version in addition to operating system. VERY high degree of choice in this regard.
cons: It took a little while to understand how to select the OS and browser version, but once I got past that, it was easy.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: it's great and easy to use
description: Overall, it was an easy experience, the onboarding is super fast and you understand it instantly, the activation time of the sessions is also fast.
author: daniel R.
pros: is one of the testing platforms I have used for more than 10 years of my career, easy and simple to use, and complete, perfect for novices and experts.
cons: perhaps aesthetically it lacks a change of icons, but its functionality is impeccable and the ease of use is enjoyed and appreciated.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: kai S.
pros: It has a free option. Its convinent. pretty straight forward.
cons: It moves slow. When I tried to use the iPhone XR option i couldnt download anything to test because the icloud was not sighned in. I feel like you need at least 10 max 60mins to test only because its hard to test in 5 mins
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: This is what I'm looking for to test my site on safari.
author: Joel M.
pros: 've tried different safari simulator and I didn't quiet like what I initially see. But with TestingBot I can tell right away that this is what I saw on my friends MAC computer. I did some fixes and opened it again and I can see the fixed logo.
cons: I don't see anything wrong yet... but will be testing a lot sooner
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Ro A.
pros: This helped me identify an issue in my CSS.
cons: Unusably slow, unintuitive UI. Need more up to date devices, but this may be a limitation of the free plan? This wasn't clear.
author_profession: Freelance SBO, Digital Strategist, UX Designer, Full-Stack Engineer

pros: Product ease to use and friendly screen. there are many options to choose.
cons: I liked everything I looked at on the system page.

author: Tu V.
pros: Vary in devices, version of browsers....
cons: Interact speed still little slow.Not really work when change responsive to the real devices

author: Franco N.
pros: I started my google search without knowing if such a product really exist, and if it did i thought it would be cumbersome to use. To my surprise using this was incredible easy to test quick and easy, i will keep an eye on TestingBot since it may come in handy for many more purposes.
cons: Maybe the feed was just a little laggy, but given the service i come to expect such a limitation, and it wasnt unbearable.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
